binary_metadata.file_type: a sh script, ASCII text executable

apt_metadata.depends: aircrack-ng, bash (>= 4.2), gawk, iproute2, iw, pciutils, procps, tmux, xterm
apt_metadata.recommends: arping, asleap, beef-xss, bettercap, bully, ccze, crunch, dnsmasq, ethtool, ettercap-text-only, hashcat, hcxdumptool, hcxtools, hostapd, hostapd-mana, hostapd-wpe, iptables, isc-dhcp-server, john, lighttpd, mdk3, mdk4, nftables, openssl, pixiewps, reaver, rfkill, sox, systemd, tcpdump, tshark, usbutils, x11-utils, x11-xserver-utils
apt_metadata.description:
multi-use bash script for Linux systems to audit wireless networks
airgeddon is a menu driven 3rd party tools wrapper to audit wireless networks
with many features.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Indexing only — no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Pair with the LLM system-prompt stanza to ensure the chain planner knows how to call this tool.
